name: Hiring-Cycle-Time (HCT)
description: The elapsed duration from 'Gap-Identification' (Slot-10) to 'Active-Onboarding-Status' (Operational-Ready-State) for new agent-slots or key human-collaborators.
goalMapping: Measures the 'Scaling-Elasticity' of the organization and the efficiency of the 'Persona-Onboarding-Logic'.
